meaning: n.登陆车,着陆者,住在陆地上的人
examples: Before Tianwen l, no country had ever tried to send an orbiter, a lander and a rover in one single expedition to Mars.
A mini garden carried on China's Chang'e 4 moon lander recently became home to the first plant to grow on another world.
This is yet another success for Chang'e-4. On January 2, the probe (探测器) became the first lander to touch down on the far side of the moon.
Only thrusters could slow the lander to its target velocity of 1.7 miles per hour.
W. (Buddy) Lander: As owners of the thrift, they had no reason to desire its destruction.
